docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,164.00 FILED BY SYUFY ENTERPRISES AS TO DEFENDANT LUZI PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUZI PATRICIA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-05-1992, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-18-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYUFY ENTERPRISES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUZI PATRICIA $3,164.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,197.00, OR RETURN OF COMPUTER EQUIPMENT LOANED TO DEF MUST BE IN GOOD WORKING ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
